## TASK COMPLETE

**Task:** Next.js Merchant Dashboard Scaffold

### What was created

**Next.js App** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/`)
- Next.js 16 with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, App Router, src directory
- Linked to `@loyalty/shared` workspace package

**Supabase SSR Auth** (3 helpers):
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/lib/supabase/server.ts` -- Server-side Supabase client using cookies
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/lib/supabase/client.ts` -- Browser-side Supabase client
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts` -- Session refresh + auth redirect logic

**Middleware** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/middleware.ts`):
- Protects all routes except `/login`, `/register`, `/api`, and static assets
- Redirects unauthenticated users to `/login`

**Login Page** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/app/login/page.tsx`):
- Email/password form with error handling and loading state
- Uses shadcn Button, Input, Label, Card components

**Dashboard Layout** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx`):
- Server-side auth check with redirect
- Sidebar + main content area

**Sidebar** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/components/dashboard-sidebar.tsx`):
- 7 navigation links: Dashboard, Programs, Clients, Campaigns, Analytics, QR Codes, Settings
- Active route highlighting with lucide-react icons

**Dashboard Home** (`C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/src/app/(dashboard)/page.tsx`):
- Placeholder page for KPI dashboard

**shadcn/ui Components** (11 components installed):
- button, card, input, label, table, dialog, tabs, badge, select, textarea, sonner

**Configuration**:
- `C:/Users/User/loyalty-app/apps/dashboard/.env.example` -- Supabase URL and anon key placeholders
- TypeScript check passes cleanly (`tsc --noEmit` with zero errors)

### Deviation from plan

**[Rule 1 - Bug] .env.example was gitignored by default** -- The create-next-app template's `.gitignore` has `.env*` which blocks `.env.example`. Added `!.env.example` exception and committed separately.

**[Adaptation] Used `sonner` instead of `toast`** -- The `toast` component is deprecated in current shadcn/ui. Installed `sonner` (the recommended replacement) instead.
